# Security Policy

DemonClaw is security tooling. If you discover a vulnerability, please do not open a public issue.

## Reporting

Email: security@bluedot.it.com (preferred)

Include:
- A clear description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce
- Affected versions/commit
- Any suggested mitigations

## Supported Versions

This project is under active development. Only the `main` branch is supported.
